meta.description: Structured SASB disclosure requirements for the Sustainable Industry Classification System (SICS) Chemicals standard (RT-CH), mirroring the status taxonomy already used in gri_requirements.json. Each disclosure lists its status, the dataset columns it draws from (reused from the existing 5 GRI datasets wherever possible), and any known data gaps.
meta.industry: Resource Transformation Sector — Chemicals (RT-CH), assumed from the CarbonBlackProductiont production denominator used throughout the codebase. Confirm with stakeholders if the entity's primary SICS classification differs.

statuses.implemented: Disclosed and sourced from existing dataset columns
statuses.narrative_gap: Required qualitative management narrative — cannot be auto-generated from data
statuses.data_gap: Requires dataset column(s) that do not currently exist
statuses.partial: Some of the disclosure is computed; a sub-part is missing data or methodology confirmation

110a_1_gross_scope1.title: Gross global Scope 1 emissions
110a_1_gross_scope1.notes: Identical figure to GRI 305-1; reused verbatim via /api/sasb/kpis (sasb-scope1-ghg).

110a_1_regulatory_coverage.title: Percentage of Scope 1 emissions covered under emissions-limiting regulations
110a_1_regulatory_coverage.notes: No column in any dataset flags which facilities operate under an emissions cap-and-trade or similar regulatory scheme.

110a_2.title: Discussion of long/short-term strategy to manage Scope 1 emissions, targets, and performance against targets
110a_2.notes: Qualitative management narrative; cannot be derived from data. Rendered as a placeholder table in SASB reports, same convention as GRI management-approach disclosures.

120a_1_nox.title: Air emissions of NOx (excluding N2O)
120a_1_nox.notes: Already computed in get_ghg_kpis() and the /api/environment/ghg chart endpoint; was not previously surfaced as a KPI card. Now exposed via /api/sasb/kpis (sasb-nox).

120a_1_sox.title: Air emissions of SOx
120a_1_sox.notes: Same as NOx above. Exposed as sasb-sox.

120a_1_voc.title: Air emissions of volatile organic compounds (VOCs)
120a_1_voc.notes: Same as NOx above. Exposed as sasb-voc.

120a_1_pm.title: Air emissions of particulate matter (PM10)
120a_1_pm.notes: Same as NOx above. Exposed as sasb-pm.

120a_1_haps.title: Air emissions of hazardous air pollutants (HAPs)
120a_1_haps.notes: No HAP-specific column exists in the GHG dataset today.

130a_1_total_energy.title: Total energy consumed
130a_1_total_energy.notes: Identical figure to GRI 302-1; exposed as sasb-energy-consumed.

130a_1_pct_grid.title: Percentage of total energy from grid electricity
130a_1_pct_grid.notes: Grid electricity volume exists but is not yet framed as a percentage-of-total KPI; this is a computation gap, not a data gap.

130a_1_pct_renewable.title: Percentage of total energy from renewable sources

140a_1_withdrawn.title: Total water withdrawn
140a_1_withdrawn.notes: Identical figure to GRI 303-3; exposed as sasb-water-withdrawn (converted to ML).

140a_1_consumed.title: Total water consumed
140a_1_consumed.notes: Identical figure to GRI 303-5; exposed as sasb-water-consumed (converted to ML).

140a_1_pct_stress.title: Percentage of each in regions with High or Extremely High Baseline Water Stress (WRI Aqueduct)
140a_1_pct_stress.notes: A self-reported stress-area flag exists and is reused for sasb-water-stress-pct, but it has not been confirmed to align with the WRI Aqueduct baseline water stress classification SASB expects. Flagged 'partial' until that mapping is verified — same caveat already noted in gri_requirements.json for the related GRI 303 sub-disclosures (303_3_b, 303_4_c, 303_5_b).

140a_2.title: Number of incidents of non-compliance associated with water quality and/or quantity permits, standards, and regulations
140a_2.notes: No compliance-incident dataset exists anywhere in the system.

150a_1_generated.title: Amount of hazardous waste generated
150a_1_generated.notes: HazardousFlag column already exists in the GRI 306 dataset (used internally by pdf_report.py's pivot_haz() for GRI 306-4/306-5 hazardous-split tables) but was never surfaced as a standalone KPI. Now exposed via hazardous_waste_breakdown() and /api/sasb/kpis (sasb-hazardous-waste, sasb-nonhazardous-waste).

150a_1_pct_recycled.title: Percentage of hazardous waste recycled
150a_1_pct_recycled.notes: Computed as hazardous-diverted / hazardous-generated. Exposed as sasb-hazardous-recycled-pct.

210a_1.title: Discussion of engagement processes to manage risks and opportunities associated with community interests
210a_1.notes: Pure qualitative narrative; no dataset exists or is planned for this topic.

320a_1_trir.title: Total recordable incident rate (TRIR), for direct employees and contractors
320a_1_trir.notes: WorkerType column already exists in GRI 403 data but the existing rate_per_basis() calls summed across both Employee and Contractor. New safety_rate_split() helper filters by WorkerType before applying the identical rate_per_basis() formula. Exposed as sasb-trir-total, sasb-trir-employee, sasb-trir-contractor.

320a_1_fatality_rate.title: Fatality rate, for direct employees and contractors
320a_1_fatality_rate.notes: FatalitiesInjury and FatalitiesIllHealth columns already exist and are already summed in get_safety_kpis(), but no fatality-rate KPI existed. New fatality_rate() helper reuses rate_per_basis(). Exposed as sasb-fatality-rate.

320a_1_nmfr.title: Near miss frequency rate (NMFR)
320a_1_nmfr.notes: GRI 403 tracks First Aid Cases, Recordable Injuries, Lost Time Injuries, and High-Consequence Injuries, but no 'near miss' (no-injury precursor event) column exists.

410a_1.title: Revenue from products designed for use-phase resource efficiency
410a_1.notes: Requires product-level revenue and design-intent data that does not exist in any current dataset.

410b_1.title: Percentage of products that contain substances on a hazard chemical list, and discussion of screening process
410b_1.notes: No chemical inventory or hazard-classification dataset exists. Optional scope — many chemicals reporters treat this as narrative-only in year one.

410b_2.title: Discussion of safety and environmental stewardship practices for products containing hazardous substances
410b_2.notes: Pure qualitative narrative, dependent on 410b_1 data existing first.

RT-CH-530.standard: RT-CH-530a — Management of the Legal & Regulatory Environment

530a_1.title: Discussion of corporate positions related to government regulations and/or policy proposals on environmental and social factors
530a_1.notes: Pure qualitative narrative; no dataset exists or is planned for this topic.

RT-CH-540.standard: RT-CH-540a — Operational Safety, Emergency Preparedness & Response

540a_1_count.title: Process Safety Incidents Count (PSIC)
540a_1_count.notes: GRI 403 captures occupational safety (slips, falls, struck-by), not process safety (loss of containment, fire/explosion at a chemical facility). This is a genuinely different operational data source that does not exist today. Flagged as the highest-priority gap in the SASB integration plan.

540a_1_pstir.title: Process Safety Total Incident Rate (PSTIR)
540a_1_pstir.notes: Formula would reuse rate_per_basis() unchanged once incident-count and hours-worked-at-covered-facilities data exists.

540a_2_psisr.title: Process Safety Incident Severity Rate (PSISR)
540a_2_psisr.notes: Same dependency as PSTIR, plus a severity classification per incident.
